what: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegEconomo
title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegEconomo
text: ggseg 2.0 atlas package providing brain atlas data ggseg ecosystem. data-package custom functions.

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegEconomo
text: data/*.rda – Unified ggseg_atlas objects (2D + 3D one object) R/data.R – Roxygen2 documentation atlas R/ggsegEconomo-package.R – Package-level docs, imports ggseg.formats R/sysdata.rda – Internal palette data (brain_pals) data-raw/ – Scripts generated/converted atlas data

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegEconomo
text: package depends ggseg.formats provides ggseg_atlas class. atlas objects work ggseg::geom_brain() (2D) ggseg3d::ggseg3d() (3D).

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegEconomo
text: Update docs: devtools::document() Run tests: devtools::test() (testthat edition 3, describe/style) Full check: devtools::check() Build pkgdown site: pkgdown::build_site()

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegEconomo
text: code comments except necessary workarounds Roxygen2 markdown enabled Tests use describe/BDD style vdiffr visual regression NEWS.md tracks user-facing changes (CI/pkgdown changes) URLs point ggseg GitHub org (LCBC-UiO)

what: Economo Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
title: Economo Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: package contains dataset plotting Economo & Koskinas 1925 historical atlas functional segregation ggseg ggseg3d, based supplementary materials Pijnenburg et al., NeuroImage, 239, 2021 DOI; Version 1; 15-01-2021. C.F. von Economo, G.N. Koskinas; Die Cytoarchitektonik Der Hirnrinde Des Erwachsenen Menschen; J. Springer (1925) learn use atlases, please look documentation ggseg ggseg3d

title: Economo Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: recommend installing ggseg-atlases ggseg r-universe: can install released version ggsegEconomo GitHub :   Please note ‘ggsegEconomo’ project released Contributor Code Conduct. contributing project, agree abide terms.
code: # Enable this universe options(repos = c(     ggsegverse = 'https://ggsegverse.r-universe.dev',     CRAN = 'https://cloud.r-project.org'))  # Install some packages install.packages('ggsegEconomo') # install.packages("remotes") remotes::install_github("ggsegverse/ggsegEconomo") library(ggseg) #> Warning: package 'ggseg' was built under R version 4.1.1 #> Loading required package: ggplot2 library(ggseg3d) library(ggsegEconomo)  plot(economo) +   theme(legend.position = "bottom",          legend.text = element_text(size = 9)) +   guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 6)) library(dplyr) ggseg3d(atlas = economo_3d) %>%    add_glassbrain() %>%    pan_camera("right lateral")

title: Economo & Koskinas Cytoarchitectonic Atlas — economo
text: Brain atlas based historical Economo & Koskinas 1925 cytoarchitectonic parcellation 15 regions per hemisphere. Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain() 3D vertex indices ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

title: Economo & Koskinas Cytoarchitectonic Atlas — economo
text: C.F. von Economo, G.N. Koskinas; Die Cytoarchitektonik Der Hirnrinde Des Erwachsenen Menschen; J. Springer (1925) Pijnenburg et al., NeuroImage, 239, 2021, doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2021.118274

title: Economo & Koskinas Cytoarchitectonic Atlas — economo
code: economo() #>  #> ── economo ggseg atlas ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> Type: cortical #> Regions: 15 #> Hemispheres: left, right #> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior #> Palette: ✔ #> Rendering: ✔ ggseg #> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices) #> ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> # A tibble: 30 × 3 #>    hemi  region               label                   #>    <chr> <chr>                <chr>                   #>  1 left  CT1                  lh_CT1                  #>  2 left  CT1_2_fro_inf        lh_CT1_2_fro_inf        #>  3 left  CT1_2_mof            lh_CT1_2_mof            #>  4 left  CT1_2_pref_ins_postc lh_CT1_2_pref_ins_postc #>  5 left  CT1_2_temp           lh_CT1_2_temp           #>  6 left  CT2_fro              lh_CT2_fro              #>  7 left  CT2_par              lh_CT2_par              #>  8 left  CT3_fro              lh_CT3_fro              #>  9 left  CT3_par              lh_CT3_par              #> 10 left  CT4_occ              lh_CT4_occ              #> 11 left  CT4_dmpf             lh_CT4_dmpf             #> 12 left  CT5_cen              lh_CT5_cen              #> 13 left  CT5_ins              lh_CT5_ins              #> 14 left  CT5_med              lh_CT5_med              #> 15 left  CT5_occ              lh_CT5_occ              #> 16 right CT1                  rh_CT1                  #> 17 right CT1_2_fro_inf        rh_CT1_2_fro_inf        #> 18 right CT1_2_mof            rh_CT1_2_mof            #> 19 right CT1_2_pref_ins_postc rh_CT1_2_pref_ins_postc #> 20 right CT1_2_temp           rh_CT1_2_temp           #> 21 right CT2_fro              rh_CT2_fro              #> 22 right CT2_par              rh_CT2_par              #> 23 right CT3_fro              rh_CT3_fro              #> 24 right CT3_par              rh_CT3_par              #> 25 right CT4_occ              rh_CT4_occ              #> 26 right CT4_dmpf             rh_CT4_dmpf             #> 27 right CT5_cen              rh_CT5_cen              #> 28 right CT5_ins              rh_CT5_ins              #> 29 right CT5_med              rh_CT5_med              #> 30 right CT5_occ              rh_CT5_occ

what: ggsegEconomo: Economo Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegEconomo-package
title: ggsegEconomo: Economo Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegEconomo-package
text: Economo & Koskinas 1925 historical cytoarchitectonic atlas 'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides unified 'ggseg_atlas' object 2D polygon geometry 3D vertex indices, use 'ggseg' 'ggseg3d'.

title: ggsegEconomo: Economo Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegEconomo-package
ggsegEconomo 2.0.0
text: economo now ggseg_atlas object (ggseg.formats) containing 2D 3D data. separate economo_3d object removed. Use ggplot() + ggseg::geom_brain(atlas = economo) 2D plots ggseg3d::ggseg3d(atlas = economo) 3D plots – object. Atlas recreated scratch using ggsegExtra::create_cortical_atlas() original fsaverage5 annotation files. ggseg.formats now hard dependency (Depends). Package URLs updated LCBC-UiO ggseg GitHub organisation.
